strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product or platform leadership at scale
No advanced degree and no recognized AI expertise or published AI products

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Director-level IC bar
Breadth of engineering experience and OSS founding

response.justification: Candidate has ~15 years of solid full-stack and infrastructure engineering with entrepreneurial signals (GISCollective, OSS libraries, talks). However, the role demands Principal/Director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products, which is not evidenced here — AI exposure is recent and tooling-focused rather than strategic. Strong engineer, but a stretch for this specific bar.
